title: Justice in Action:
body:
Justice in Action:
How Insurance Fraud Reports Lead to Real Prosecutions

Fraud reports don’t vanish into a void; they set justice in motion. Trace how fraud suspicions move through investigations and end in real prosecutions. Explore the role of Special Investigation Units, learn to spot red flags, and see how honest documentation and reporting help build stronger cases. Featuring true examples from federal and state prosecutions, you’ll gain insight into evolving schemes, the latest investigative tools, and why every report—large or small—can protect policyholders, uphold ethics, and make a measurable impact on fraud reduction.

Pricing
$64.00*		Webinar Duration
120 minutes		CE Requirements
Verify your state and license CE requirements

Webinar Details

Justice in Action: How Insurance Fraud Reports Lead to Real Prosecutions

Discover how everyday fraud tips can lead to courtroom convictions. Real cases, sharp insights, and practical tools to help you recognize and report fraud with confidence.

Topics

  • Explore how fraud suspicions evolve into full-scale investigations and prosecutions
  • Examine real-life cases that reveal how individual reports lead to major convictions
  • Understand the vital work of Special Investigation Units and their collaboration with prosecutors
  • Learn to identify red flags and apply best practices for ethical, effective fraud reporting
  • Build confidence to recognize, document, and report fraud that protects both consumers and the industry
